description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a youthful appearance, wearing a long-sleeve raglan shirt with a graphic on the chest and a pair of knee-length shorts. The individual has a slim build and stands with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. The person is wearing slip-on shoes with visible soles and has a headband holding back medium-length hair styled in a ponytail. The face is detailed with glasses, and the overall attire is casual, suitable for everyday urban environments. The figure's proportions and posture are realistic, and the clothing fits loosely, indicating comfort and ease of movement.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with glasses, a ponytail, and a relaxed, neutral stance in shorts and a long-sleeve shirt.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face with glasses, chest graphic, and full details of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, headband, and profile of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, ponytail, and the fit of the shirt and shorts from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, ponytail, and side of the shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt with a chest graphic and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
